mapper.insert: INSERT INTO location_build (build_no, build_name, gis, about, uploader, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{buildNo}, #{buildName}, #{gis}, #{about}, #{uploader}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE location_build SET build_no = #{buildNo}, build_name = #{buildName}, gis = #{gis}, about = #{about}, uploader = #{uploader}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE location_build SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM location_build WHERE id = #{id} and deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_build
AND build_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.buildNo}, '%')
AND build_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.buildName}, '%')
AND uploader = #{conditions.uploader}
AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM location_build WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
